goals.title: Startup/workspace smoke: isolated profile launch
goals.body: Launch the Qt 6 app with an isolated runtime profile, confirm the intended instance is under test, and capture startup/workspace screenshots.

goals.title: Viewer/rendering parity: default scene and viewer crop
goals.body: Compare the Qt 6 viewer against the baseline for default scene display, blank/nonblank viewer behavior, and screenshot crop evidence.

goals.title: Drawing/input parity: raster/vector strokes and tablet basics
goals.body: Validate basic raster and vector drawing input, cursor/stroke alignment, pressure-sensitive tablet behavior, and obvious latency regressions.

goals.title: Timeline/xsheet smoke: navigation, selection, playback basics
goals.body: Smoke frame navigation, cell selection, playback controls, and common xsheet/timeline interactions for Qt 6 regressions.

goals.title: Palette/styles smoke: style selection and color edit behavior
goals.body: Validate style selection, color editing, palette panel interactions, and any Qt 6 visual or signal/slot regressions.

goals.title: Studio field-test pass: creative workflow acceptance
goals.body: Reserve a human field-test pass for real creative workflows once CI, Codex smoke evidence, and targeted human smoke items are no longer blocking.
